description: Roizen Lab website (hypothesisdriven.org) surfaces: tenure-readiness scoring, letter-writer field scraping, publications-feed consumption, and cross-CM bus emission.

surfaces.description: Scores the working site HTML against the 4-audience tenure rubric; diffs vs baseline, exit 1 on regression. Gotcha: grade gates are content-based, not deploy-based.

outputs.report: stdout grade + per-check PASS/WARN/FAIL; baseline at docs/tenure_readiness_baseline.json

surfaces.description: Field-of-interest scrape for tenure letter-writers: L1 PubMed e-utils with L2 ORCID fallback for name collisions. Gotcha: NET-gated tests; weekly cron refresh Sunday 03:00.

inputs.writers: name list embedded; ORCID iD used for disambiguation on collision

outputs.fields: per-writer field-of-interest terms consumed by scripts/wire_letter_writers.py

surfaces.description: Consumer-side parser for Archivist's publications feed with staleness banner. Gotcha: contract awaits Archivist counter-sig; parser is live-ready but unplugged.

inputs.feed: Archivist publications list per contract shape

outputs.publications: parsed list + staleness indicator for site Publications section

surfaces.description: POSTs cross-CM events to Pilot's trial bus (Bearer via TRIAL_BUS_TOKEN through get-fitness-cred.sh). Gotcha: env-gated CROSS_CM_BUS_TRIAL_ENABLED; dry-run default when off; audit-logged every path.

inputs.kind: event kind string (camelCase schema per Pilot)

surfaces.description: Playwright site-wide QA gate on the canonical page: console health, broken images, CLS width/height, a11y alt/landmarks, SEO/JSON-LD presence, mobile overflow at 390px.
Layer-4 /ccc backstop: lists session external writes from the ~/.kleiber readback ledger so each is confirmed read-back before close. Advisory, exit 0 always.

inputs.session: optional session id; falls back to time window

outputs.report: stdout list of unconfirmed external writes
